allow: PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/api/health/" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; $r.Content } catch { "Server not responding - check logs\\server_err.txt" })
Bash(venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import whitenoise, groq, gunicorn; print\('all import OK'\)")

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { Stop-Process -Id $c.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "Stopped temp instance on 3001" } else { "Nothing on 3001" })

Bash(venv/Scripts/python.exe manage.py shell -c "from django.contrib.auth.models import User; print\('TOTAL USERS:', User.objects.count\(\)\); [print\(f'ID={u.id} | username={u.username} | email={u.email} | staff={u.is_staff} | superuser={u.is_superuser} | active={u.is_active} | hash={u.password[:20]}...'\) for u in User.objects.order_by\('id'\)]")

PowerShell($c = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $c.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } ; "cleaned 3001" } else { "3001 already clear" }; $d = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($d\) { "port 3000 still serving your frontend" } else { "port 3000 free" })

Bash(venv/Scripts/python.exe manage.py shell -c "from django.contrib.auth.models import User; print\('TOTAL:', User.objects.count\(\)\); [print\(f'ID={u.id} | {u.username} | {u.email} | admin={u.is_superuser} | staff={u.is_staff} | active={u.is_active}'\) for u in User.objects.order_by\('id'\)]")
